concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent throughout the document. The main slide titles, which represent the same hierarchical level in the source (Goal 1.x, Goal 2.x), are inconsistently tagged as H1 or H2. For example, Section 4 (Goal 1.1) uses H1, while Section 5 (Goal 1.2) uses H2. Section 6 (Goal 1.3) reverts to H1.
